ValidationRule.description: Agreements cannot be cancelled if they are already terminated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISCHANGED(Status__c)), ISPICKVAL( Status__c, 'Terminated' ), NOT(ISBLANK(Cancellation_Date__c)), ISCHANGED(Cancellation_Date__c), NOT( $User.BypassValidationRules__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot request a Cancellation of an already Terminated Agreement
